history.text:
Analyze this image and generate an EXTREMELY DETAILED, LONG, and highly descriptive AI image generation prompt based EXACTLY on the structure below. Every section must be comprehensively detailed.

Format Required:
make picture ultra-realistic
subject: [ONLY mention the gender here without any physical traits. Example: "a man", "a woman", "a man and a woman"]
Angel kamera/framing: [Describe the camera angle, framing, and composition in extreme detail. Match the reference exactly (e.g., selfie, full body, collage style, design UI overlay)]
Outfit: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the clothing, materials, textures, folds, styling, and accessories]
pose: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the body posture, hand positions, facial expression, and micro-expressions]
enviroment: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the background, props, atmosphere, and specific surrounding elements]
lighting: [Provide a very long, highly detailed description of the light direction, shadows, ambient light, mood, and reflections]
Final style: [Highly detailed, high resolution. Add "handheld", "iPhone photography look", "candid photo", "not too perfect". If there is a framing design/collage in the reference, emphasize that the final output MUST match that specific framing/design style exactly]

Rules:
- Output ONLY the requested format text above. No markdown blocks (```), no introductory text, no explanations.
- Write all descriptions in English.
- The descriptions MUST be extremely long and highly detailed to produce a high resolution image with an amateur/iPhone handheld feel.

Negative Prompt:
worst quality, low quality, normal quality, lowres, blurry, ugly, distorted, deformed, watermark, text, signature, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra limbs, deformed iris, fused fingers, distorted face, unnatural skin, plastic, uncanny valley

make picture ultra-realistic
subject: a woman
Angel kamera/framing: Medium shot, slightly low angle, capturing the woman from the chest up. The camera is positioned to look slightly up at her, emphasizing her gaze. The composition is slightly off-center, with the woman's face turned to her left, looking upwards and away from the camera. The background is softly blurred, creating a shallow depth of field that keeps the focus squarely on the subject. The image has a candid, spontaneous feel, as if captured in a fleeting moment.
Outfit: She wears a thick, cream-colored cable-knit sweater with intricate braided patterns and visible texture. Over the sweater, she has a large, cozy scarf with a bold plaid pattern in shades of deep brown and light blue. The scarf is wrapped loosely around her neck, with one end draped over her shoulder, showcasing its soft, slightly fuzzy material and the way it drapes naturally. The textures of the knit sweater and the woven scarf contrast subtly.
pose: The woman's head is tilted upwards, her gaze directed towards something out of frame above and to her left. Her eyes are open and looking intently, with a slight tilt to her head that suggests curiosity or contemplation. Her lips are slightly parted, giving a natural, unposed appearance. Her long, dark brown hair is loose and falls around her shoulders, with some strands gently catching the falling snow. Her expression is serene and thoughtful, conveying a sense of quiet observation.
enviroment: The scene is set outdoors on a street during a gentle snowfall. The background features out-of-focus buildings with traditional architectural elements, including wooden window frames and textured walls. Snow covers the ground and falls softly through the air, creating a serene and wintry atmosphere. A blurred reflection of a person and a circular object (possibly a mirror or sign) can be seen in the background, adding a layer of depth and intrigue to the scene. The overall environment feels calm and slightly isolated due to the falling snow.
lighting: Soft, diffused natural light illuminates the scene, characteristic of an overcast winter day. The light source appears to be from above and slightly to the left, casting subtle, soft shadows on the woman's face and neck. The falling snowflakes catch the light, appearing as small, bright specks against the softer tones of the background and her clothing. There are no harsh highlights or deep shadows, contributing to the gentle and ethereal mood of the image. The ambient light is cool and even, enhancing the feeling of a cold, snowy day.
Final style: Highly detailed, high resolution, handheld, iPhone photography look, candid photo, not too perfect.
